description: The Superintendent, St. Joachim Estate, Ratnapura and another. Vs Ceylon Estates Staffs’ Union. before Hon. Damith Thotawatte, J.
parties: The Superintendent, St. Joachim Estate, Ratnapura and another. Vs Ceylon Estates Staffs’ Union.
keywords: Sections 31D and 31DD of the Industrial Disputes Act, Article 138 of the Constitution, Failure to exhaust statutory remedy, Jurisdiction of the Court of Appeal, Legislative intent.
legistation: The Constitution of the Democratic Socialist Republic of Sri Lanka, The Industrial Disputes Act No. 43 of 1950 (as amended), The High Court of the Provinces (Special Provisions) Act No. 19 of 1990.
